learning_outcomes.description: Analyse the rapidly changing context for the composition and dissemination of strategic communication material, and how this shapes organisational reputation.
Become familiar with using different forms of strategic communication writing, the range of strategic communication writing tools used in practice, and the adaptation of tools for cross-platform use.
Critically assess the effectiveness of strategic communication writing with a focus on the usefulness of AI prompts and reflection.
Undertake effective reviewing, revising and editing of strategic communication writing with and without the use of artificial intelligence tools.
Apply strategic writing principles including clarity, conciseness, consistency, coherence, creativity and use of plain language.
Demonstrate an ability for connecting with target audiences using strong professional writing skills for various forms of strategic communication writing.
Learn to design and produce a range of strategic communication collaterals to suit an organisation's needs.
Understand the ethical and legal standards of practice in the composition of strategic communication material, including through the use of AI tools.
